message:
feat: enhance NATS client and improve H1 streaming

NATS client enhancements (nats.rs):
- Add JetStream consumer support
- Request/reply with headers
- Improved subscription management
- Better error handling and reconnection

HTTP/1.1 streaming (stream.rs):
- Simplify body reading logic
- Improve chunked encoding performance
- Better memory management for large bodies

TCP stream (stream.rs):
- Minor timeout handling improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
